description: Legal document. Bill of divorce, Fusṭāṭ. Dated: 15 Kislev 1461 (17 November 1149). This bill of divorce is one of forty under the T-S 10J2 shelfmark; this bill was not completed and consequently was not signed. The divorce is between Yiṣḥaq b. [. . .] ha-Ḥaver and Yamān bat Beraḵot. (Information from Goitein's index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
